# Image Generation

- Route: `/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/imageGeneration`
- Source API mapping path: `/src/docs/apiReference/model/imageGeneration/api.ts`
- Source chunk: `https://s16-kling.klingai.com/kos/s101/nlav112918/api-doc/assets/api-CG7_tJXk.js`

## Endpoint IDs

- `create-image-generation`
- `query-image-generation-single`
- `query-image-generation-list`

## Endpoint Paths

- `/v1/images/generations`
- `/v1/images/generations/{id}`

## Raw API Chunk Source

```javascript
const e={title:{en:"Image Generation",zh:"图像生成"},endpoints:[{id:"create-image-generation",method:"POST",path:"/v1/images/generations",title:{en:"Create Task",zh:"创建任务"},description:{en:"Please note that in order to maintain naming consistency, the original model field has been changed to model_name, so in the future, please use this field to specify the version of the model that needs to be called.",zh:"请您注意，为了保持命名统一，原 model 字段变更为 model_name 字段，未来请您使用该字段来指定需要调用的模型版本。"},headers:[{name:"Content-Type",type:"string",required:!0,default:"application/json",description:{en:"Data Exchange Format",zh:"数据交换格式"}},{name:"Authorization",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Authentication information, refer to API authentication",zh:"鉴权信息，参考接口鉴权"}}],requestBody:[{name:"model_name",type:"string",required:!1,default:"kling-v1",description:{en:"Model Name",zh:"模型名称"},enum:["kling-v1","kling-v1-5","kling-v2","kling-v2-new","kling-v2-1"]},{name:"prompt",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Positive text prompt",zh:"正向文本提示词"},notes:[{en:"Cannot exceed 2500 characters",zh:"不能超过 2500 个字符"}]},{name:"negative_prompt",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Negative text prompt",zh:"负向文本提示词"},notes:[{en:"Cannot exceed 2500 characters",zh:"不能超过 2500 个字符"},{en:'Note: In the Image-to-Image scenario (when the "image" field is not empty), negative prompts are not supported.',zh:"注：图生图（即 image 字段不为空时）场景下，不支持负向提示词"}]},{name:"image",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Reference Image",zh:"参考图像"},notes:[{en:"- Support inputting image Base64 encoding or image URL (ensure accessibility)",zh:"- 支持传入图片 Base64 编码或图片 URL（确保可访问）"},{en:"Base64 Encoding Note:\n Please note, if you use the Base64 method, make sure all image data parameters you pass are in Base64 encoding format. When using Base64, do NOT add any prefix like `data:image/png;base64,`. Only provide the Base64-encoded string.\n\nCorrect:\n```plaintext\niVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```\n\nIncorrect:\n```plaintext\ndata:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```",zh:"Base64 编码说明：\n请注意，若您使用base64的方式，请确保您传递的所有图像数据参数均采用Base64编码格式。使用 Base64 时，请不要添加任何前缀如 `data:image/png;base64,`，只需提供 Base64 编码字符串本身。\n\n正确示例：\n```plaintext\niVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```\n\n错误示例：\n```plaintext\ndata:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```"},{en:"- Supported image formats: .jpg / .jpeg / .png",zh:"- 图片格式支持 .jpg / .jpeg / .png"},{en:"- File size: ≤10MB, dimensions: min 300px, aspect ratio: 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1",zh:"- 图片文件大小不能超过 10MB，图片宽高尺寸不小于 300px，图片宽高比介于 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1 之间"},{en:"- Required when image_reference parameter is not empty",zh:"- image_reference 参数不为空时，当前参数必填"}]},{name:"image_reference",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Image reference type",zh:"图片参考类型"},enum:["subject","face"],notes:[{en:"- `subject`: character feature reference, `face`: character appearance reference",zh:"- `subject`（角色特征参考）, `face`（人物长相参考）"},{en:"- When using `face`, the uploaded image must contain only one face",zh:"- 使用 `face`（人物长相参考）时，上传图片需仅含 1 张人脸"},{en:"- **Required when using kling-v1-5 and image parameter is not empty**",zh:"- **使用 kling-v1-5 且 image 参数不为空时，当前参数必填**"},{en:"- Only kling-v1-5 supports the current parameter",zh:"- 仅 kling-v1-5 支持当前参数"}]},{name:"image_fidelity",type:"float",required:!1,default:"0.5",description:{en:"Face reference intensity for user-uploaded images during generation",zh:"生成过程中对用户上传图片的参考强度"},notes:[{en:"Value range: [0, 1], The larger the value, the stronger the reference intensity",zh:"取值范围：[0, 1]，数值越大参考强度越大"}]},{name:"human_fidelity",type:"float",required:!1,default:"0.45",description:{en:"Facial reference intensity, refers to the similarity of the facial features of the person in the reference image",zh:"面部参考强度，即参考图中人物五官相似度"},notes:[{en:"Only image_reference parameter is subject is available",zh:"仅 image_reference 参数为 subject 时生效"},{en:"Value range: [0, 1], The larger the value, the stronger the reference intensity",zh:"取值范围：[0, 1]，数值越大参考强度越大"}]},{name:"resolution",type:"string",required:!1,default:"1k",description:{en:"Image generation resolution",zh:"生成图片的清晰度"},enum:["1k","2k"],notes:[{en:"- `1k`: 1K standard, `2k`: 2K high-res",zh:"- `1k`：1K 标清, `2k`：2K 高清"},{en:"Different model versions support varying ranges. For details, refer to the [Capability Map](/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap)",zh:"不同模型版本支持范围不同，详见 [能力地图](/cn/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap)"}]},{name:"n",type:"int",required:!1,default:"1",description:{en:"Number of generated images",zh:"生成图片数量"},notes:[{en:"Value range: [1, 9]",zh:"取值范围：[1, 9]"}]},{name:"aspect_ratio",type:"string",required:!1,default:"16:9",description:{en:"Aspect ratio of the generated images (width:height)",zh:"生成图片的画面纵横比（宽:高）"},enum:["16:9","9:16","1:1","4:3","3:4","3:2","2:3","21:9"],notes:[{en:"Different model versions support varying ranges. For details, refer to the [Capability Map](/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap)",zh:"不同模型版本支持的范围不同，详见 [能力地图](/cn/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap)"}]},{name:"watermark_info",type:"object",required:!1,description:{en:"Whether to generate watermarked results simultaneously",zh:"是否同时生成含水印的结果"},notes:[{en:'- Defined by the enabled parameter, format: \n```json\n  "watermark_info": { "enabled": boolean } \n```',zh:'- 通过enabled参数定义，具体格式如下：\n```json\n "watermark_info": { "enabled": boolean } \n```'},{en:"- true: generate watermarked result, false: do not generate",zh:"- true 为生成，false 为不生成"},{en:"- Custom watermarks are not currently supported",zh:"- 暂不支持自定义水印"}]},{name:"callback_url",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"The callback notification address for the result of this task.
```
